ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2018 Continued To Jan-02-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To Ccp 128.7
Off Calendar Dec-10-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
James Martinez (510-444-7700) Plaintiff/opposing party in pro per.
Andrew Catterall, esq. (415-956-8100) for Defendant/Moving party SUSAN BALDINI.

Hearing is held. Defendant ARGUED that Plaintiff sat on indemnification agreement for 2 months before requesting TRO to enter property, and this case is frivolous. Plaintiff ARGUED that he did not sit on the documents, he was waiting for death certificate from the coroner's office, and this should have been a demurrer rather than 128.7. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT SUSAN BALDINI'S Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To Ccp 128.7 is Taken Under Submission. Both sides to submit proposed orders. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2018 Continued To Dec-04-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2018 Continued To Oct-16-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appeareance by Plaintiff. Plaintiff counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Oct-16-2018 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-07-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
